items.title: Second Furnace Operations Commenced.
items.summary:
Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. is pleased to announce the commencement of operations for its second furnace at Norbugang Industrial Park, Samtse.

The start of the second furnace marks an important milestone in strengthening our production capacity, improving operational continuity, and supporting the company’s long-term growth plans.

We extend our appreciation to our employees, technical teams, partners, and stakeholders for their continued support in achieving this milestone.

For further information, please contact sales@aja.bt.
